'''hodavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:atactiform|atactiform]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-d-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:atactiform|atactiform]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hodavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hodavithi|hodavithi]] || [[word:hodaviji|hodaviji]] || [[word:hodavishi|hodavishi]] || [[word:hodaviki|hodaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hodavuthuthu|hodavuthuthu]] || [[word:hodavujuju|hodavujuju]] || [[word:hodavushushu|hodavushushu]] || [[word:hodavukuku|hodavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hodavuthu|hodavuthu]] || [[word:hodavuju|hodavuju]] || [[word:hodavushu|hodavushu]] || [[word:hodavuku|hodavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hodavufthuf|hodavufthuf]] || [[word:hodavufjuf|hodavufjuf]] || [[word:hodavufshuf|hodavufshuf]] || [[word:hodavufkuf|hodavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hodavethe|hodavethe]] || [[word:hodaveje|hodaveje]] || [[word:hodaveshe|hodaveshe]] || [[word:hodaveke|hodaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hodavothotho|hodavothotho]] || [[word:hodavojojo|hodavojojo]] || [[word:hodavoshosho|hodavoshosho]] || [[word:hodavokoko|hodavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hodavotho|hodavotho]] || [[word:hodavojo|hodavojo]] || [[word:hodavosho|hodavosho]] || [[word:hodavoko|hodavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hodavofthof|hodavofthof]] || [[word:hodavofjof|hodavofjof]] || [[word:hodavofshof|hodavofshof]] || [[word:hodavofkof|hodavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfthÃŸf|hodavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfjÃŸf|hodavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfshÃŸf|hodavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfkÃŸf|hodavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|hodavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|hodavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|hodavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|hodavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfthÃŸf|hodavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfjÃŸf|hodavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfshÃŸf|hodavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfkÃŸf|hodavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfthÃŸf|hodavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfjÃŸf|hodavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfshÃŸf|hodavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hodavÃŸfkÃŸf|hodavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hodavÃḊthÃḊ|hodavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:hodavÃḊjÃḊ|hodavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:hodavÃḊshÃḊ|hodavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:hodavÃḊkÃḊ|hodavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hodavathatha|hodavathatha]] || [[word:hodavajaja|hodavajaja]] || [[word:hodavashasha|hodavashasha]] || [[word:hodavakaka|hodavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hodavatha|hodavatha]] || [[word:hodavaja|hodavaja]] || [[word:hodavasha|hodavasha]] || [[word:hodavaka|hodavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hodavafthaf|hodavafthaf]] || [[word:hodavafjaf|hodavafjaf]] || [[word:hodavafshaf|hodavafshaf]] || [[word:hodavafkaf|hodavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hodavasha|hodavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hodavshÃḋsha|hodavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hodavrosha|hodavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hodavmusha|hodavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hodavyasha|hodavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohodavnkshÃḋsha|gohodavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohodavnkrosha|gohodavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohodavnkmusha|gohodavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohodavnkyasha|gohodavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hodadavasha|hodadavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hodadavshÃḋsha|hodadavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hodadavrosha|hodadavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hodadavmusha|hodadavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hodadavyasha|hodadavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohodadavnkshÃḋsha|gohodadavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohodadavnkrosha|gohodadavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohodadavnkmusha|gohodadavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohodadavnkyasha|gohodadavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hedÃḊvasha|hedÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hedÃḊvshÃḋsha|hedÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hedÃḊvrosha|hedÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hedÃḊvmusha|hedÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hedÃḊvyasha|hedÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohedÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gohedÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohedÃḊvnkrosha|gohedÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohedÃḊvnkmusha|gohedÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohedÃḊvnkyasha|gohedÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hodfavasha|hodfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hodfavshÃḋsha|hodfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hodfavrosha|hodfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hodfavmusha|hodfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hodfavyasha|hodfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohodfavnkshÃḋsha|gohodfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohodfavnkrosha|gohodfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohodfavnkmusha|gohodfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohodfavnkyasha|gohodfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
